description: A university aerospace rocketry club needs a parametric model of their Level 3 sounding rocket for aerodynamic analysis. Read the geometry specification document located at /home/ga/Desktop/rocket_spec.txt to understand the required dimensions. Then, in OpenVSP, create a new model representing this rocket. You must use an appropriate axisymmetric body component (such as a Fuselage, Stack, Pod, or BodyOfRevolution) for the main airframe, which includes a tapering nose cone, a cylindrical body tube, and a tapering boat-tail. Additionally, add the 4 stabilization fins using a thin symmetric wing component (or multiple wing components). The total body length should be approximately 2.40 meters, and the maximum body diameter should be approximately 0.152 meters. Save the completed model to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/sounding_rocket.vsp3.
